first_100k.label: first_100k
first_100k.description: The first 100,000 zeros of the Riemann zeta function.
first_100k.precision_note: Odlyzko table index states accuracy within 3e-9.
first_100k.notes: One ordinate per line. Gzip-compressed text source.

first_2001052.label: first_2001052
first_2001052.description: The first 2,001,052 zeros of the Riemann zeta function.
first_2001052.precision_note: Odlyzko table index and Sage package documentation state accuracy within about 4e-9.
first_2001052.notes: One ordinate per line. Gzip-compressed text source; this is intentionally not downloaded in default runs.

block_1e12_10k.label: block_1e12_10k
block_1e12_10k.precision_note: Odlyzko table header states values are guaranteed accurate only within 1e-8.
block_1e12_10k.notes: Rows are offsets from gamma base 267653395647 after a header.

block_1e21_10k.label: block_1e21_10k
block_1e21_10k.precision_note: Odlyzko table header says values are not guaranteed and are probably accurate within 1e-6.
block_1e21_10k.notes: Rows are offsets from gamma base 144176897509546973000 after a header.

block_1e22_10k.label: block_1e22_10k
block_1e22_10k.precision_note: Odlyzko table header says values are not guaranteed and are probably accurate within 1e-6.
block_1e22_10k.notes: Rows are offsets from gamma base 1370919909931995300000 after a header.

notes: No block is downloaded by default.
High-block tables store offsets from a stated gamma base; normalization must preserve small adjacent differences.
